content.explanation:
**Tenses Part 2 — Continuous Tenses:**

Continuous tenses बताते हैं कि कोई action **चल रहा है / चल रहा था / चल रहा होगा।**

**1. Present Continuous (अभी हो रहा है):**
🇮🇳 मैं अभी पढ़ रहा हूँ।
🇬🇧 I **am reading** right now.
Formula: Subject + is/am/are + V1+ing

**2. Past Continuous (तब हो रहा था):**
🇮🇳 जब वह आया, मैं सो रहा था।
🇬🇧 When he came, I **was sleeping**.
Formula: Subject + was/were + V1+ing

**3. Future Continuous (तब हो रहा होगा):**
🇮🇳 कल इसी वक्त मैं train में होऊँगा।
🇬🇧 Tomorrow at this time, I **will be travelling** by train.
Formula: Subject + will be + V1+ing
rules: Present Continuous: am/is/are + V+ing (I am, He is, They are)
Past Continuous: was/were + V+ing (I was, They were)
Future Continuous: will be + V+ing (all subjects)
Continuous tenses show ongoing / in-progress actions
Stative verbs (know, love, want, have, believe) — NOT used in continuous
Signal words: now, at this moment, at that time, while, when
Interrupted action: "I was watching TV when the power went off."
content.memoryTrick: **ING = In the middle of doinG** — जब भी '-ing' दिखे, action अभी बीच में है। Is/Am/Are = Present में; Was/Were = Past में; Will be = Future में!

examples.hindi: वह अभी phone पर बात कर रही है।
examples.english: She is talking on the phone right now.

examples.hindi: जब मैं खाना बना रहा था, बिजली चली गई।
examples.english: While I was cooking, the power went off.

examples.hindi: वे कल सुबह 8 बजे meeting में होंगे।
examples.english: They will be attending a meeting at 8 AM tomorrow.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम कल शाम काम कर रहे होगे?
examples.english: Will you be working tomorrow evening?

examples.hindi: मैं TV नहीं देख रहा था।

mistakes.why: Know = stative verb — never use -ing form

mistakes.wrong: She was ran when it rained.
mistakes.correct: She was running when it rained.

speakingTips: अभी क्या हो रहा है describe करो: 'Right now I am sitting and studying English.'
Past story में continuous use करो: 'It was raining when I left the house.'
Future plans: 'This time next week, I will be travelling to Jaipur.'

vocabulary.example: Meanwhile, she was preparing the report.
Please do not interrupt while I am speaking.

practice.hindi: मैंने कल एक अच्छी फिल्म देखी।
practice.english: I watched a good movie yesterday.
alternatives: i saw a good film yesterday.

practice.hindi: वह सुबह जल्दी उठी।
practice.english: She woke up early in the morning.
alternatives: she got up early this morning.

practice.hindi: हम पिछले साल शिमला गए थे।
practice.english: We went to Shimla last year.
alternatives: we visited shimla last year.

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने कल रात खाना खाया?
practice.english: Did you eat last night?
alternatives: did you have food last night?

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे कोई जवाब नहीं दिया।
practice.english: He did not give me any answer.
alternatives: he didn't give me any reply.

practice.hindi: मेरे दादाजी एक शिक्षक थे।
practice.english: My grandfather was a teacher.
alternatives: my grandpa was a teacher.

practice.hindi: बच्चे ने ज़ोर से रोया।
practice.english: The child cried loudly.
alternatives: the child wept loudly.

practice.hindi: मैंने पाँच साल पहले नौकरी शुरू की।
practice.english: I started working five years ago.
alternatives: i began my job five years ago.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझसे माफ़ी माँगी।
practice.english: She apologized to me.
alternatives: she said sorry to me.

practice.hindi: हमने मिलकर खाना बनाया।
practice.english: We cooked food together.
alternatives: we made food together.

practice.hindi: जब मैं पढ़ रहा था, बिजली चली गई।
practice.english: While I was studying, the electricity went off.
alternatives: when i was reading, the power went out.

practice.hindi: वह रात को 12 बजे तक काम कर रही थी।
practice.english: She was working until midnight.
alternatives: she was working till 12 at night.

practice.hindi: बच्चे सुबह से खेल रहे थे।
practice.english: The children were playing since morning.
alternatives: the kids were playing from morning.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम कल उस वक्त सो रहे थे?
practice.english: Were you sleeping at that time yesterday?
alternatives: were you asleep at that time?
practice.hint: Were you + verb+ing + at that time ?

practice.hindi: वे सब एक साथ गाना गा रहे थे।
practice.english: They were all singing together.
alternatives: they were singing a song together.

practice.hindi: मैं घर जा रहा था जब उसने मुझे रोका।
practice.english: I was going home when she stopped me.
alternatives: i was heading home when she stopped me.

practice.hindi: वह खिड़की से बाहर देख रहा था।
practice.english: He was looking outside the window.
alternatives: he was staring out of the window.

practice.hindi: बारिश हो रही थी इसलिए हम नहीं गए।
practice.english: It was raining so we did not go.
alternatives: it was raining so we didn't go.

practice.hindi: जब मैं खाना बना रहा था, वह आई।
practice.english: She came while I was cooking food.
alternatives: she arrived while i was making food.

practice.hindi: वे लोग घंटों बातें कर रहे थे।
practice.english: They were talking for hours.
alternatives: they were chatting for hours.

practice.hindi: जब पुलिस आई, चोर जा चुका था।
practice.english: By the time the police arrived, the thief had already left.
alternatives: when police came, thief had escaped.

practice.hindi: मैंने उसे पहले कभी नहीं देखा था।
practice.english: I had never seen him before.
alternatives: i had not seen him earlier.

practice.hindi: उसने खाना खाने से पहले हाथ धोए थे।
practice.english: She had washed her hands before eating.
alternatives: she had washed hands before having food.

practice.hindi: परीक्षा से पहले मैंने पूरा syllabus पढ़ लिया था।
practice.english: I had completed the entire syllabus before the exam.
alternatives: i had finished studying before the exam.

practice.hindi: वह बात मैं पहले से जानता था।
practice.english: I had already known that.
alternatives: i had known that already.

practice.hindi: जब तक हम पहुँचे, फिल्म शुरू हो चुकी थी।
practice.english: By the time we arrived, the movie had already started.
alternatives: when we reached, the film had started.
practice.hint: By the time + Simple Past + had + past participle

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे बताया कि वह पहले वहाँ जा चुका था।
practice.english: He told me that he had already been there.
alternatives: he said he had visited there before.
practice.hint: told me that + had + past participle

practice.hindi: डॉक्टर के आने से पहले मरीज़ बेहोश हो गया था।
practice.english: The patient had fainted before the doctor arrived.
alternatives: the patient had become unconscious before doctor came.
practice.hint: had + past participle + before + Simple Past

practice.hindi: उसने कभी इतनी मुश्किल परिस्थिति नहीं देखी थी।
practice.english: He had never faced such a difficult situation before.
alternatives: he had never seen such difficulty before.

practice.hindi: जब तक वह जागा, बाकी सब जा चुके थे।
practice.english: By the time he woke up, everyone else had already left.
alternatives: when he got up, the others had gone.
practice.hint: by the time + Simple Past + had + gone

practice.hindi: मैंने अपनी परीक्षा पास की।
practice.english: I passed my exam.
alternatives: i cleared my exam.

practice.hindi: उसने नया घर खरीदा।
practice.english: He bought a new house.
alternatives: he purchased a new home.

practice.hindi: हम पिछले महीने मिले थे।
practice.english: We had met last month.
alternatives: we met last month.

practice.hindi: बच्चा रो रहा था और माँ गाना गा रही थी।
practice.english: The child was crying while the mother was singing.
alternatives: the baby was crying and mom was singing.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे एक महँगा तोहफा दिया।
practice.english: She gave me an expensive gift.
alternatives: she gifted me an expensive present.

practice.hindi: मैंने कभी इतना अच्छा खाना नहीं खाया था।
practice.english: I had never eaten such delicious food before.
alternatives: i had never tasted such good food.

practice.hindi: जब फोन बजा, मैं शॉवर ले रहा था।
practice.english: When the phone rang, I was taking a shower.
alternatives: when the phone rang, i was in the shower.

practice.hindi: पिछले साल उसकी तनख्वाह बढ़ी।
practice.english: His salary increased last year.
alternatives: his salary was raised last year.

practice.hindi: वे पाँच घंटे से गाड़ी चला रहे थे।
practice.english: They had been driving for five hours.
alternatives: they were driving for five hours.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे अपना राज़ बताया।
practice.english: She told me her secret.
alternatives: she shared her secret with me.
